preflight.note: Created before implementation work starts. Re-vendors RepoPact 1.6.0 after contributing ForgeLink's checkbox-parity check upstream, and removes the now-redundant local copy.

acceptance_criteria.text: Add the RepoPact 1.6.0 README<->manifest checkbox-parity check to the vendored scripts/validate_repo.py (preserving ForgeLink's preflight extension) and bump the pins (scripts/REPOPACT_VERSION, requirements-repopact.txt, audits/registry.json) to 1.6.0.

Remove the now-redundant local checkbox-parity check (former LIE-001) from .local/validate_system.py, since parity is authoritative in the vendored validator; .local retains the schema-ladder (LIE-003) and link/last_verified checks.
Both python scripts/validate_repo.py and python .local/validate_system.py pass on the tree.
